completedSprints.name: Foundation
completedSprints.summary: Flutter project initialized with Riverpod, GoRouter, Freezed, Hive. SessionModel with Duration-as-int-seconds. TimerPhase sealed union. 17 presets. Material 3 dark theme. 13 passing tests.

completedSprints.name: Timer Engine
completedSprints.summary: Timer engine with DateTime-based timing, full state machine, pause/resume, skip, warning, audio cues. 23 engine tests passing.

completedSprints.name: Timer Screen
completedSprints.summary: Full timer UI: CountdownDisplay, ProgressRing, RoundIndicator, PhaseLabel, TimerControls, session summary, complete screen. 19 widget tests.

completedSprints.name: Sessions
completedSprints.summary: SessionRepository with CRUD, Hive persistence, duplicate, serialize/deserialize. Session editor with form validation. Updated home screen with long-press actions. 18 repository tests.

keyDecisions: Duration stored as int seconds (not Duration type)
Hive JSON strings (no TypeAdapters — GitHub issue #795)
Timer: Notifier with Timer.periodic, NOT StreamProvider
clock package for testable DateTime (fakeAsync compatible)
50ms tick interval (20 FPS) for smooth countdown
No hive_generator — JSON encode/decode approach only
Warning is a threshold check within work phase, NOT a separate state
SessionRepository: JSON strings in Hive box, FakeBox for tests
StateProvider invalidation pattern for session list refresh
notes: Sprints 0-3 complete. 73 tests passing. Ready for Sprint 4: Background & Audio.
